title: Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures}}
[[File:Adventures_Kit.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Ad for the ''Star Wars Adventures'' membership kit.]]
'''''Star Wars Adventures''''' was a series of novels, game books, and magazines published by [[Scholastic]] beginning in [[October]] [[2002]] after the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. ''Episode II Adventures'' consisted of six all new stories written by [[Ryder Windham]], followed by seven reprinted stories from '' ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''.

==Publisher's summary==
Children who enroll in the program at the special introductory price of $2.95 will receive a multi-piece starter kit containing: the all new [[Star Wars Adventures 1: Hunt the Sun Runner|''Hunt the Sun Runner'']] adventure novel by [[Ryder Windham]] and accompanying game book, a [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine Premiere Issue|Game Guide]] and [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine Premiere Issue|Game Notebook]], 11 Game Cards and two dice, a Scoring Pad, the first installment of ''[[Star Wars Adventures Magazine]]'', a ''Star Wars Adventures'' poster of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], an exclusive club ID card, and a carrying case shaped like a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] helmet.
